label: Terrain Affordance Def
description: Defines a terrain capability used by building placement, terrain validation, overlays, and map generation.

order.label: Order
order.description: Sort order used when displaying terrain requirements and choosing which affordance overlay color has priority.

visualizeOnAffordanceOverlay.label: Visualize on affordance overlay
visualizeOnAffordanceOverlay.description: If true, terrain with this affordance can be shown on the terrain affordance overlay using this def's overlay color.

affordanceOverlayColor.label: Affordance overlay color
affordanceOverlayColor.description: Color used by the terrain affordance overlay when this affordance is the highest-priority visualized affordance on a cell.

blockAffordanceOverlay.label: Block affordance overlay
blockAffordanceOverlay.description: If true and this affordance is present on a cell, lower-priority affordance overlay visualization is suppressed.
